notes: 2025-2026 NAND/DRAM shortage drove SSD prices up 40-80% vs 2024. Many catalog prices reflect pre-shortage levels and are now well BELOW PT market (risk: negative margin). SATA SSDs remain sold but are declining in demand vs NVMe for system drives — retained as archive/secondary storage. ATX 3.1 is current PSU standard; ATX 3.0 units still sold but should be flagged for refresh within 12 months. EVGA PSU line is wind-down — SuperNOVA G7 still listed at some retailers but no new stock from EVGA since late 2024.

products.name: Samsung 990 Pro 2TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Top-tier Gen4 NVMe, widely available PT (KuantoKusta 19 stores, Worten, Radio Popular, PcComponentes, CHIP7). Catalog within ±10% of PT market (€160-€200 range).

products.name: WD Black SN850X 4TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: 4TB Gen4 premium tier. PT market €450-€520 post-NAND-shortage. Catalog ~20% below market — negative margin risk. Raise to €449.

products.name: WD Blue SN580 1TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Mainstream Gen4 1TB. PT market €80-€95 currently. Catalog ~22% below — raise to €84.99.

products.name: Kingston NV2 2TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Budget DRAM-less Gen4. PT market €125-€145. Catalog ~26% below. NV2 still current (not EOL). Raise to €129.99.

products.name: Crucial P3 Plus 2TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Entry Gen4 DRAM-less. PT market €130-€150 post-shortage. Catalog ~21% below.

products.name: Seagate FireCuda 530 2TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Durable Gen4 with heatsink, PS5 popular. Within ±10% of PT market (€195-€225). Note: FireCuda 540 (Gen5) is newer sibling but 530 still widely sold.

products.name: Crucial T500 2TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Current-gen Crucial flagship Gen4. PT market €170-€195 at PcComponentes/Globaldata. Within ±10%.

products.name: SK Hynix Platinum P41 2TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Still current (P51 Gen5 is successor but P41 sold alongside). PT availability via Amazon.es cross-border + some PT retailers. Within ±5%.

products.name: Kingston KC3000 2TB NVMe Gen4
products.notes: Flagship Kingston Gen4. PT market €155-€185. Within ±10%.

products.name: Samsung 990 EVO Plus 2TB
products.notes: Gen4 x4 / Gen5 x2 hybrid. Global price surged to ~$325 (€300) in Q1 2026 per Pangoly/Gizmodo. PT market €240-€290. Catalog ~23% below — raise to €249.99. Description's '10.000 MB/s PCIe 5.0' is INCORRECT — real spec is 7.250 MB/s Gen4. Fix description.

products.name: WD Black SN850X 2TB
products.notes: Top PS5/gaming Gen4 NVMe. PT market €165-€195. Within ±5%. (Duplicate of ID 17's family — consider consolidating SKUs).

products.name: Crucial T700 2TB
products.notes: CRITICAL: PCIe Gen5 flagship. PT market €472-€598 per KuantoKusta (6 stores). Catalog is HALF of market price — severe loss-making. T700 (Gen5) is premium tier, not mid-range. Raise to €499.99 or consider replacing with T705 (newer Gen5).

products.name: Seagate FireCuda 540 2TB
products.notes: Gen5 NVMe. PT market €290-€360. Catalog ~28% below. Raise to €299.99.

products.name: Kingston KC3000 4TB
products.notes: 4TB Gen4. PT market €400-€460. Catalog ~21% below.

products.name: Samsung 870 EVO 4TB
products.notes: SATA III 4TB. Radio Popular lists at €474.99 (verified). SATA SSDs technically 'legacy' but remain sold as secondary/archive storage (NOT obsolete — still manufactured and demanded). Catalog is ~41% below market — severe underpricing. Raise to €449 or drop SKU if margin can't be achieved.

products.name: Corsair MP700 PRO 2TB
products.notes: Gen5 flagship with heatsink. PT market €350-€420. Catalog ~29% below. Raise to €349.99.

products.name: Sabrent Rocket 5 2TB
products.notes: Sabrent brand has near-zero distribution in PT. Only via Ubuy cross-border (€350+ with fees). KuantoKusta shows no listings. Either drop SKU or reprice at €349 with import-fee disclaimer. Also: Amazon US current price $499 (~€460) — catalog €210 is less than half.

products.name: Seasonic Focus GX-750 80+ Gold
products.notes: Classic Seasonic 750W ATX 2.x still sold. KuantoKusta PT listings €105-€125. Within ±10%. Note: V3 ATX 3.1 variant (SSR-750FX3) is the current SKU — if stocking new, prefer V3.

products.name: be quiet! Pure Power 12 M 850W
products.notes: Current gen, ATX 3.0. PT market €125-€145. Within ±5%.

products.name: EVGA SuperNOVA 1000 G7 80+ Gold
products.replacement_suggestion: Corsair RM1000x (2024) ATX 3.1 or Seasonic Focus GX-1000 ATX 3.1
products.notes: EVGA exited consumer GPU in 2022 and has been winding down PSU line. G7 is ATX 2.x (no native 12VHPWR/12V-2x6), not ATX 3.1. Minimal new stock in PT. Replace with current-gen ATX 3.1 unit for RTX 5000/AMD RX 9000 compatibility.

products.name: Corsair SF750 80+ Platinum SFX
products.notes: SFX gold standard for ITX builds. PT market €170-€200. Still current. Within ±10%. (inStock:false in catalog — verify supplier).

products.name: MSI MEG Ai1300P PCIE5 80+ Platinum
products.notes: ATX 3.0 1300W Platinum. PT market €295-€340. Within ±5%. Duplicate of ID 166 (same model, different catalog price) — consolidate SKUs.

products.name: NZXT C850 80+ Gold (2024)
products.notes: Current gen 2024 refresh with ATX 3.0 + 12VHPWR. PT market €115-€140. Within ±5%.

products.name: Thermaltake Toughpower GF3 850W
products.notes: ATX 3.0 850W Gold. PT market €115-€140. Within ±10%.

products.name: Corsair HX1500i
products.notes: Flagship 1500W Platinum digital PSU. PT market €410-€470. Within ±10%.

products.name: Seasonic PRIME TX-1000
products.notes: Titanium 1000W flagship. PT market €360-€410. Within ±5%. Premium halo SKU.

products.name: be quiet! Dark Power 13 850W
products.notes: Titanium ATX 3.0. PT market €240-€280. Within ±10%.

products.name: Corsair RM850x 2024
products.notes: ATX 3.1 + PCIe 5.1, best-seller. PT market €145-€175. Within ±10%. Hero SKU — consider pushing as featured product.

products.name: MSI MEG Ai1300P PCIE5
products.notes: ATX 3.1 version (vs ID 66 ATX 3.0). Within ±5%. Consolidate with ID 66 (same product family) — dedupe SKU.

products.name: Thermaltake Toughpower GF3 750W
products.notes: ATX 3.0 750W Gold. PT market €105-€130. Within ±5%.

products.name: Fractal Design Ion+ 2 860W
products.notes: Ion+ 2 Platinum is being phased out — Fractal's current lineup is Ion Gold 2024. Limited PT availability. Listed on Globaldata/PCDiga only sporadically. Consider replacing with Fractal Ion Gold 2024 or dropping SKU.
